## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content creation process and guidelines for Firework's marketing content.](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will provide 3 content calibration articles this week for Firework's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Goal is to align on content style/voice and scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Charissa (new at Firework) will provide guidelines on target keywords, audience, and desired tone](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [GrowthX has an AI-assisted content production process they can adapt to Firework's needs](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Process

  - [GrowthX uses AI to research keywords, analyze top-ranking content, and produce drafts](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Multi-step process to ensure high quality, optimized for SEO and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Can adapt their process to align with Firework's preferred style/voice](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Firework's Content Needs

  - [Charissa is still getting familiar with Firework's content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Needs to determine target keywords, audience personas, desired tone (formal vs casual)](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Will provide guidelines to GrowthX, even rough notes this week are helpful](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

### Integration and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX will share call recording/notes from separate meeting](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Charissa will try to provide initial content guidelines by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [GrowthX can start publishing content for Firework next week](https://fathom.video/share/j6wUNvZnzg6qL-3TKrxC_kMURW9K3uC-?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
